summary: Read-only QA review accepts MODEL-ROUTING-AMENDMENT-001. The lead handoff is schema-valid; the diff is limited to model-routing, Skill, documentation, and routing state changes; protected original ZIP/checksum/validation artifacts are untouched; taskctl state remains FOUNDATION-001 ACCEPTED with FOUNDATION-002 and FOUNDATION-008 as ready DRAFT candidates; Spark is constrained from final review; no duplicate lead or active duplicate thread was found; validation commands were re-run successfully; current lead actual model/effort is honestly recorded as unknown.

Tracked diff is limited to .codex config/agents, monsoon-studio-orchestrator Skill/templates/references, PROJECT_STATUS.md, and docs 06/14/15/25; untracked expected additions are spark-worker.toml, docs/26-model-routing-amendment.md, project/model-routing-state.json, and the lead handoff.
No changes to original ZIP, sha256, SHA256SUMS, or VALIDATION_REPORT artifacts.
FOUNDATION-001 ACCEPTED; FOUNDATION-002 through FOUNDATION-008 remain DRAFT.
FOUNDATION-002 and FOUNDATION-008 are dependency-satisfied DRAFT ready candidates.

format:check, lint, typecheck, and test passed across apps/web, packages/core, and tools/hello hello baselines.

Post-validation status remained limited to the reviewed routing/doc/state changes, the lead handoff, a concurrently present valid systems_architect ACCEPT handoff, this QA handoff, project/model-routing-state.json, and untracked node_modules.
VALID systems_architect ACCEPT handoff observed during final status check.

decisions: ACCEPT: MODEL-ROUTING-AMENDMENT-001 is a scoped routing-policy amendment and does not modify frozen product, architecture, roadmap, task facts, or protected import validation artifacts.

The model matrix is internally consistent: lead/systems/gameplay/QA/security are gpt-5.5 xhigh; simulation/client/historical are gpt-5.5 high; research_scout is gpt-5.4-mini medium; test/balance are gpt-5.4-mini high; release_engineer and spark_worker are gpt-5.3-codex-spark medium.
Spark is not permitted to be a final reviewer or to ACCEPT work; Spark outputs require GPT-5.5 high/xhigh review.
The current lead thread actual model and effort remain unobservable and are honestly recorded as unknown in project/model-routing-state.json.
risks: The repository still has untracked node_modules from validation/install state; this is not a reviewed source artifact and should not be committed.
No live Spark task has been spawned yet under the amendment; first real Spark use still needs a concrete thread ID and task-scoped handoff record.
requested_action: Integrate the accepted model-routing amendment, keep protected import artifacts untouched, do not commit node_modules, and continue routing only through GPT-5.5 high/xhigh final review gates.
